note: Phase 3 domain-driven seed registry. This replaces the legacy A-J draft; full variable expansion will be generated during Phase 3 implementation.

variables.name: latest_report_end_date
variables.formula_ref: max(financial_indicator_raw.end_date where coalesce(effective_date, ann_date) <= trade_date)

variables.name: latest_financial_effective_date
variables.formula_ref: coalesce(financial_indicator_raw.effective_date, financial_indicator_raw.ann_date) matched by latest_report_end_date

variables.name: latest_financial_ann_date
variables.formula_ref: financial_indicator_raw.ann_date matched by latest_report_end_date

variables.name: report_age_days
variables.formula_ref: trade_date - latest_financial_effective_date

variables.name: report_lag_days
variables.formula_ref: latest_financial_effective_date - latest_report_end_date
